working_on: Phase 1.5.3 — Author ADR 0035 (multi-platform Apple expansion superseding ADR 0032), rewrite ROADMAP Phase 9 against triad + multi-platform, amend docs/business.md Pricing and Distribution.
outcome_summary: Phase 1.5.3 closed. ADR 0035 (multi-platform Apple expansion) lands at Status: Accepted, superseding ADR 0032 by broadening commitment 1 from single-platform iOS to *Apple platforms via App Store. iPhone + iPad first-class via a single SwiftUI codebase. Mac via Designed-for-iPad opt-in with modest keyboard/menu polish. No Android, no web app, no native AppKit/Catalyst Mac app.* Commitments 2–6 restate verbatim (cost-priced subscription / no free tier; builder eats API costs within fixed annual operating subsidy budget; no BYOK / no institutional regime; ADR 0029 reframed as fixed annual subsidy; static polish / minimum-shape maintenance). Supersession-by-narrowing-revision, not supersession-by-reversal — the disposition spirit (single-codebase / single-store / single-billing-path) survives the broadening; corruption-vector test from ADR 0032 binds at the new boundary. ADR 0032 Status flipped to `Superseded by [ADR 0035]` with supersession callout box. Settles ADR 0034's flagged downstream Mac-via-Designed-for-iPad polish-depth question at "modest keyboard/menu polish." ROADMAP Phase 9 success criteria substantially rewritten against the Discovery / Planning / Engagement triad + multi-platform Apple; Android / web framing dropped entirely; cost-cap, exit affordance, delete-account, data-export, no-general-chat, static-polish, dynamic-feature foreclosure all preserved. docs/business.md Pricing and Distribution Distribution row amended; Personal Project Disposition section's commitment 1 paragraph updated to broadened version; introductory blockquote and disposition cross-link updated to ADR 0035 as active contract; commitments 2–6 paragraphs unchanged in substance. adr/README.md updated (Phase 1.5 table extended; ADR 0032 row flipped; orientation paragraph updated). MemPalace decision drawer drawer_paideia_general_680ccb1932c659fc86c72938 filed (verbatim conversational reasoning per CLAUDE.md two-layer decision-recording discipline). ADR count after S-0015: 35 ADRs total (33 Accepted + 2 Superseded — ADR 0002 by ADR 0032; ADR 0032 by ADR 0035). tools/validate.py clean (0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns). CHANGELOG entry under [Unreleased] for S-0015. STATE.md handoff to S-0016 (Phase 1.5.4: rendering policy revision + secondary docs sweep — extends ADR 0027 forbidden-token enumeration; updates AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md; light-revises ADRs 0012 and 0014; sweeps ~10 secondary docs).
